QF.id: VB Legal Structure of Mutual Funds_4

question.text: What does AMC stand for in the mutual fund industry?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** AMC stands for Asset Management Company. It is the company that is appointed by the trustees to manage the mutual fund's investments on a day-to-day basis. The AMC employs fund managers, analysts, and other professionals who make investment decisions. Examples include SBI Funds Management, HDFC AMC, ICICI Prudential AMC, etc. **The Trap:** The other options are made-up terms. AMC is one of the most fundamental terms in mutual funds — always remember it as Asset Management Company. **Cross-Exam Context:** This is also tested in Series V-A (MF Distributors) as a basic industry term. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** When you sell mutual funds, you are essentially connecting your clients with an AMC. Know your AMCs well — their reputation, fund performance, and service quality all matter to your clients.
